title: Pixel Perfect Terrastorage
description: Tweaks to the UI textures from the mod Terrastorage
body:
**Q: What is this?**

**A:** It's a resourcepack for the mod [**Terrastorage**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrastorage) by **TimVinci**. You need the mod to see any changes.


**Q: Why?**

**A:** I really like the mod [**Terrastorage**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrastorage) but the resolution of the mod's textures don't match the rest of the Minecraft UI. That bothered me a little so I remade them a little more Minecraft-y.

**Q: Can I use it in my modpack?**

**A:** Yeah sure.
